title: carex contigua subsp. pairae
intro: Carex contigua subsp. pairae is a type of sedge, a perennial plant that belongs to the Carex genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Carex contigua subsp. pairae is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in traditional medicine preparations, such as decoctions and tinctures.
